comment: "I liked the clear comparison between different types of chemical and radiological agents, their mechanisms, and characteristic symptoms and appreciated the detailed discussion of specific antidotes. I found the real-world clinical cases from Syria, Japan, and Goiânia especially engaging, as they connected theory with practice. Finally, the emphasis on hospital and community preparedness reinforced the importance of coordination and planning in disaster response."
"I feel very glad that I have chosen this course."
"All the visual media was perfect to me."
